name: uipath-sites
description: Routing plugin that treats matched Sites requests as UiPath coded apps, suppresses Sites hosting assumptions, and applies ui-ux-pro-max as UI-only guidance after ensuring the UiPath CLI is available.

interface.shortDescription: Route Sites into UiPath coded apps.
interface.longDescription: UiPath Sites teaches Codex to treat matched @Sites requests as UiPath coded apps, suppress Sites starter/hosting/storage assumptions, ensure the UiPath CLI is present at session start, defer coded-app operations to the installed UiPath coded-app skill, and use ui-ux-pro-max only for UI/UX guidance.
defaultPrompt: @Sites build a UiPath coded app for Maestro.
@Sites create a coded app using uipath-typescript.
@Sites build a UiPath coded app and hand off deployment to uip codedapp.
